Chancenkarte (Opportunity Card)

This is the introduction paragraph that should be processed.

Requirements

To apply for the Chancenkarte, you need to score at least 6 points. You must be 18 years or older.

Basic German language skills (A1) or English (B2) are required.

Financial Proof

You need a blocked account with at least 1000 EUR per month.

Do not include this footer
